name: Assault X
official_rules_text: When a weapon with the Assault X keyword is added to an Attack Pool, if the defending unit is within 1 of the attacking unit's unit leader, you may upgrade X of that weapon's attack dice.
description: When a weapon with the Assault X keyword is added to an Attack Pool, if the defending unit is within 1 of the attacking unit's unit leader, you may upgrade X of that weapon's attack dice.
